'''Joe Chandler''' (born 11 February 1988) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who has played in the 2000s and 2010s. He last played for the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], as a {{rlp|pr}}.

==Background==
Joe Chandler was born in [[Dewsbury]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.<ref name="Joe Chandler Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/> He played for the Churwell Chiefs, Shaw Cross Sharks and the [[Leeds Rhinos]] academy.<ref>{{web archive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080821110715/http://leedsrugby.dnsupdate.co.uk/leedsrhinos/acadprofiles/squad-page.asp?ID=184 |title=Player Profiles: Joe Chandler |date=21 August 2008}}, ''Leeds Rugby''</ref><ref name=DR10jan2013>{{cite web|url=https://www.dewsburyreporter.co.uk/sport/joe-is-back-at-sharks-as-boss-2357708 |title=Joe is back at Sharks as boss |website=Dewsbury Reporter |date=10 January 2013 |access-date=1 June 2026}}</ref>

==Playing career==
In 2008, Chandler made one [[Super League]] appearance for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in an 18–12 victory over the [[Castleford Tigers]].<ref>{{cite web|title=Leeds 18-12 Castleford|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/7473407.stm|website=BBC Sport|access-date=17 April 2017|date=28 June 2008}}</ref>

Chandler joined [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] ahead of the 2010 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/championship-1-preview-oldham |title=Championship 1 Preview: Oldham |website=Love Rugby League |date=21 February 2010 |access-date=1 June 2026}}</ref>

In the 2011 season, Chandler joined [[Halifax Panthers|Halifax]] where he scored eight tries in his first season at the club.<ref name=DR10jan2013/>

In June 2012, Chandler signed for the [[Dewsbury Rams]] initially on a one-month loan.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.dewsburyreporter.co.uk/sport/chandler-joins-rams-2374295 |title=Chandler Joins Rams |website=Dewsbury Reporter |date=25 June 2012 |access-date=1 June 2026}}</ref>

In November 2012, Chandler joined the [[Keighley Cougars]].<ref name=DR10jan2013/> He left the club at the end of the season and signed for the [[Batley Bulldogs]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.keighleynews.co.uk/sport/10712532.paul-march-james-craven-can-be-a-big-hit-at-keighley-cougars/ |title=Paul March: James Craven can be a big hit at Keighley Cougars |website=Keighley News |date=3 October 2013 |access-date=1 June 2026}}</ref>

Chandler made his debut for Batley in February 2014 and went on to make 101 appearances for the club.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://batleybulldogs.co.uk/batley-rlfc-heritage-roll-of-honour/ |title=Batley Rlfc Heritage Roll Of Honour |website=Batley Bulldogs |access-date=1 June 2026}}</ref>
